title: Why AI Risk Management Is Becoming a Core Priority for Enterprise Cybersecurity
description: Enterprise technology has entered a period of rapid transformation. title: AI-Powered Leap: Combating Pneumonia with Peptide Therapeutics
description: A collaborative effort between India and Sweden at IIIT-Delhi is utilizing artificial intelligence for rapid drug discovery against pneumonia. The project leverages AI to design peptide-based therapeutics, offering a faster alternative to traditional methods. This innovation could help tackle drug resistance and revolutionize respiratory infection treatments.
content: A remarkable collaboration between India and Sweden at the Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi, is exploring artificial intelligence to accelerate drug discovery for pneumonia. By designing peptide-based therapeutics, researchers ... [713 chars]
